recommendations.title: Thief

recommendations.title: The Score
recommendations.overview: An aging thief hopes to retire and live off his ill-gotten wealth when a young kid convinces him into doing one last heist.

recommendations.title: Love Wedding Repeat
recommendations.overview: While trying to make his sister's wedding day go smoothly, Jack finds himself juggling an angry ex-girlfriend, an uninvited guest with a secret, a misplaced sleep sedative, and the girl that got away in alternate versions of the same day.

recommendations.title: 13: Game of Death
recommendations.overview: After losing his job, his car and his money, Phuchit, races against time to complete 13 tasks ordered by an anonymous caller who promised 100 million Baht upon completion.

recommendations.title: The Entitled
recommendations.overview: Without the security of the job he wants or the future he dreamed of, Paul Dynan plans the perfect crime to help his struggling family – abduct the socialite children of three wealthy men and collect a ransom of $3-million dollars. Over the course of

recommendations.title: The Last Stop in Yuma County

recommendations.title: The Assassination of Richard Nixon
recommendations.overview: It’s 1974 and Sam Bicke has lost everything. His wife leaves him with his three kids, his boss fires him, his brother turns away from him, and the bank won’t give him any money to start anew. He tries to find someone to blame for his misfortunes and

recommendations.title: Trick 'r Treat

recommendations.title: The Aura
recommendations.overview: A quiet, epileptic taxidermist plans the perfect crime. All he needs is the right opportunity. An accident, perhaps…

recommendations.title: The Happiness of the Katakuris
